overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence following an eagle soaring over a vast natural landscape. The bird flies from open river valleys through forested rocky terrain, over a dramatic waterfall, and into a winding canyon with snow-capped mountains in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open river valley with winding water and dirt road

events.description: eagle banks left while maintaining forward flight over the valley

agents.ego_description: eagle soaring over the valley with steady wing beats, following the river's path

entered.detail: serpentine river flowing through the valley floor with reflective water surface
unpaved trail running parallel to the river through the grassland
small wooden crossing structure spanning a narrow part of the river
isolated deciduous trees dotting the grassy meadow landscape
gentle slopes covered in green grass extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: The eagle soars over a wide-open river valley bathed in morning sunlight. Below, a winding river cuts through grassy meadows alongside a dirt road and wooden bridge. Scattered oak trees dot the landscape as the bird banks left, with rolling hills visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested rocky approach to canyon waterfall

events.description: landscape transitions from open grassland to denser forested rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: eagle flying steadily toward rocky outcrops with the waterfall becoming visible in the distance

entered.detail: large stone outcrops and boulders emerging from the forest cover
thick coniferous trees covering the hillside with dark green foliage
tall cascading waterfall visible in the distance between the canyon walls

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to forested rocky hills as the eagle approaches the canyon. Rocky cliffs emerge on the right while dense pine forest covers the hillsides. The waterfall becomes visible in the far distance as the dirt road and bridge pass out of view behind the bird.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon with waterfall and mist

events.description: eagle begins descending flight path toward the waterfall
eagle flies over the waterfall edge and descends into the canyon

agents.ego_description: eagle gliding downward with wings fully spread, approaching the waterfall for a dramatic flyover

entered.detail: tall vertical rock faces forming the left side of the canyon gorge
tall vertical rock faces forming the right side of the canyon gorge
water spray rising from the base of the waterfall creating a hazy atmosphere
narrow river flowing through the bottom of the steep canyon

segments.scene_description: The eagle descends into the canyon as the waterfall looms ahead. Canyon walls rise on both sides, partially blocking the sky, while mist from the falls fills the air. The bird glides over the waterfall's edge and drops into the gorge, with the river now visible far below in the canyon bottom.

scene_state.functional_zone: river canyon opening to forested mountain valley

events.description: canyon widens into a broader forested valley with distant mountains
eagle banks right to follow the curving river through the valley

agents.ego_description: eagle flying through the canyon and emerging into the wider mountain valley, following the river's curve

entered.detail: tall mountain peak with white snow visible on the summit against the sky
thick woodland covering the valley floor ahead with mixed pine and deciduous trees

segments.scene_description: Flying through the narrow canyon, the eagle emerges into a wider forested valley. The canyon walls recede into the distance as snow-capped mountains become visible ahead. The bird banks right to follow the river's curve, leaving the thundering waterfall behind as the landscape opens up to dense forest and towering peaks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit river valley through a dramatic gorge and into a vast mountain wilderness. It begins with the eagle soaring over grassy meadows and a winding river, banking left past a wooden bridge and scattered oak trees under a bright morning sky. As the terrain shifts, the open valley gives way to forested rocky hills and dense pine forests, with the distant sight of a waterfall appearing as the river valley recedes. The camera then descends sharply into a narrow canyon where mist fills the air, gliding over the edge of the thundering waterfall and dropping deep into the gorge. Finally, the eagle emerges from the canyon walls into a wider forested valley, banking right to follow the river's curve toward towering snow-capped mountains in the distance.
